title: cymbopogon traninhensis
intro: Cymbopogon traninhensis, also known as Tranin's lemon grass, is a type of grass native to Vietnam, belonging to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Cymbopogon traninhensis include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve digestion. Cymbopogon traninhensis can be consumed as a tea, used in essential oil form, or taken as a supplement in capsule or powder form, making it a versatile herbal preparation.
